package rulefixtures

// scenario for len_string_for_empty_check: `len(s) == 0` used interchangeably with `s == ""`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule611NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario611Negative(records []Rule611NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
